organization.heading: Organization Settings
organization.noOrganizationHint: Please select an organization to manage settings.
organization.cardDescription: Manage your organization team and subscription

alerts.accessDenied: You do not have access to this organization. Please contact an organization owner for access.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.description: You do not have permission to view organization invitations

authRequired.title: Authentication Required
authRequired.description: Please sign in to view invitations

invitationCancelled.title: Invitation cancelled
invitationCancelled.description: The invitation has been cancelled successfully.

members.title: Organization Members
members.emptyDescription: This organization doesn't have any members yet.

removeDialog.title: Remove member
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the organization? They will lose access to all forms immediately.

memberRemoved.title: Member removed
memberRemoved.description: {{name}} has been removed from the organization.

invitations.title: Pending Invitations
invitations.emptyDescription: All invitations have been responded to or there are no pending invitations.

resent.title: Invitation resent
resent.description: A new invitation has been sent to {{email}}.

inviteDialog.title: Invite Team Member
inviteDialog.description: Send an invitation to join your organization. They'll receive an email with instructions to sign up and join.

member.label: Member
member.description: Can view and create forms within the organization

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Can manage forms and members, but cannot delete the organization

owner.label: Owner
owner.description: Full access including member management and organization deletion

success.title: Invitation sent successfully
success.description: An invitation has been sent to {{email}}.

invalidEmail.title: Invalid email
invalidEmail.description: Please enter a valid email address.

permission.title: Cannot invite user
permission.description: You do not have permission to invite users to this organization.

alreadyInvited.title: Already invited
alreadyInvited.description: This user has already been invited to your organization.

membershipLimit.title: Membership limit reached
membershipLimit.description: Your organization has reached its maximum member capacity.

rolePermission.title: Role permission denied
rolePermission.description: You do not have permission to invite users with this role.

permissionExpired.title: Permission expired
permissionExpired.description: You are no longer a member of this organization and cannot send invitations.

belongsToOtherOrg.title: Cannot invite user
belongsToOtherOrg.description: This user already belongs to another organization. Users can only be members of one organization at a time.

updated.title: Organization updated
updated.description: Organization name has been updated successfully.

leaveOrg.label: Leave organization
leaveOrg.description: You will lose access to all forms and data in this organization.

dialog.title: Leave organization
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}? You will immediately lose access to all forms and data. You can only rejoin if an owner sends you a new invitation.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your personal details and avatar

billing.title: Billing & Plans
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription, usage, and plan
billing.portalOpeningDesc: Manage your subscription in the new tab
billing.enterprisePendingDescription: Your Enterprise plan is set up but access is on hold until payment is completed.
billing.checkoutOpeningDesc: Complete your payment in the new tab
billing.popupBlocked: Popup blocked — please allow popups for this site and try again
billing.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

membersPage.title: Members
membersPage.subtitle: Manage team access to your organization
